name: spinner
title: Spinner
description: Accessible loading indicator. Inline currentColor SVG that spins only when motion is allowed, wrapped by default in a polite role=status region with a required status message so a stationary screen reader still learns of the wait.
useWhen: Indicating a brief indeterminate wait (a button action, a small async fetch)
Signalling background activity where progress cannot be measured
avoidWhen: Page-level or route transitions (use a skeleton plus a status region)

keyboard: The spinner is a status indicator and never takes focus
By default the icon is wrapped in role=status with aria-live=polite and a visually hidden label, because a spinning icon conveys nothing to a stationary screen reader
The status text can instead be supplied via aria-label on the role=status wrapper
The decorative prop makes the icon aria-hidden with no status role, for when an adjacent element already announces the loading state
The icon spins only under motion-safe; reduced motion shows a static ring while the status text still announces the wait
currentColor stroke keeps the icon visible in forced-colors mode
